bead.title: metric: ddx doc validate enforces metric_id; warns on budget/ratchet conflict
bead.description: Extend ddx doc validate to enforce that ddx.execution.metric.metric_id resolves to a MET artifact. Emit warning when MET.budget conflicts with gate.ratchet (gate.ratchet stays authoritative; MET.budget is documentary).
bead.acceptance: 1. ddx doc validate fails on dangling metric_id. 2. Warning emitted on budget/ratchet conflict. 3. Tests cover both.
